data.name: Night Shift
data.detailed_description:
EARLY ACCESS COMING SOON!


Two young men's lives are about to change forever as they agree to turn to a life of crime, both for personal reasons. One is a young black male, fresh out on probation, the other a young white college dropout. After tragedy strikes, they find themselves managing a strip club, along with developing a drug empire while meeting plenty of personalities along the way.​



Night Shift is a choice-driven Visual Novel.

In this game, you will have the option to play as a young black male, fresh out on probation and trying to make a new start, or a young white male who's a bit misunderstood and trying to figure out his direction. The black character manages his complicated family life, while also managing street problems, hood politics, and his ever so stuck up girlfriend. The white character is a former high school star athlete that is trying to prove his worth to not only his family, but himself, and is thrust into managing his father's strip club.


This game will specialize in delivering high quality models of all shapes and sizes, from BBW to Petite. We pay extra attention to our renders, and make sure to add every piece of cellulite or dimple needed. We also want our animations to reflect our models. No X scene or model will have the same physics.

data.short_description: Night Shift is a choice-driven Adult Visual Novel that focuses on Urban experiences. The game is packed with humor, sex, romance, crime, action, drama, and an intriguing story. Play as a young black male trying to figure out his path or a young white former star athlete trying to prove his worth.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7/8/10 (64-bit OS required)
  • 處理器: 3 GHz equivalent
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS 10.11
  • 處理器: Both
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
